title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Supreme Industries - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Supreme Industries - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Supreme Industries has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supreme Industries:
Supreme Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supreme Industries!
